CustomField.description: True when NEPA_Phase2_Applicable__c = true and the review pathway is EA or EIS. Requires a dedicated climate change assessment section per 40 CFR 1502.17 before the FONSI or ROD can be signed. Distinct from extraordinary circumstances — this is a Phase 2 documentation mandate, not a GIS proximity trigger.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Climate assessment required under CEQ Phase 2 rule (40 CFR 1502.17). Must complete before advancing to Decision stage.
CustomField.label: Climate Assessment Required
